class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> diffWaysToCompute(string expression) {
        static unordered_map<string, vector<int>> memo;
        if (memo.find(expression) != memo.end()) {
            return memo[expression];
        }
        vector<int> res;
        // Check if the expression is a number (no operators)
        bool isNumber = true;
        for (char c : expression) {
            if (c == '+' || c == '-' || c == '*') {
                isNumber = false;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (isNumber) {
            res.push_back(stoi(expression));
        } else {
            // Process each operator
            for (int i=0; i < expression.length(); ++i) {
                if (expression[i] == '+' || expression[i] == '-' || expression[i] == '*') {
                    // Split into left and right
                    vector<int> left = diffWaysToCompute(expression.substr(0, i));
                    vector<int> right = diffWaysToCompute(expression.substr(i+1));
                    // Combine the results
                    for (int l : left) {
                        for (int r : right) {
                            if (expression[i] == '+') {
                                res.push_back(l + r);
                            } else if (expression[i] == '-') {
                                res.push_back(l - r);
                            } else if (expression[i] == '*') {
                                res.push_back(l * r);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        memo[expression] = res;
        return res;
    }
};

solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> diffWaysToCompute(string expression) {
        static unordered_map<string, vector<int>> memo;
        if (memo.find(expression) != memo.end()) {
            return memo[expression];
        }
        vector<int> res;
        bool isNumber = true;
        for (char c : expression) {
            if (c == '+' || c == '-' || c == '*') {
                isNumber = false;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (isNumber) {
            res.push_back(stoi(expression));
        } else {
            for (int i = 0; i < expression.length(); ++i) {
                if (expression[i] == '+' || expression[i] == '-' || expression[i] == '*') {
                    vector<int> left = diffWaysToCompute(expression.substr(0, i));
                    vector<int> right = diffWaysToCompute(expression.substr(i + 1));
                    for (int l : left) {
                        for (int r : right) {
                            if (expression[i] == '+') {
                                res.push_back(l + r);
                            } else if (expression[i] == '-') {
                                res.push_back(l - r);
                            } else if (expression[i] == '*') {
                                res.push_back(l * r);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        memo[expression] = res;
        return res;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n * 2^n) where n is the number of operators in the expression
space complexity: O(n * 2^n) for memoization and recursion stack
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses memoization to avoid redundant computations of subexpressions. It recursively splits the expression at each operator, computes all possible results for left and right subexpressions, and combines them. The memoization ensures each subexpression is computed only once, leading to efficient handling of overlapping subproblems. The main weakness is the potential exponential time complexity for expressions with many operators, but the constraints (expression length ≤ 20) make this acceptable.
